titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of TNA DL 25/87

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=852 status=reviewed modified=2023-03-13 15:02:37.103141+00 | translation moa=853 status=reviewed modified=2023-03-13 15:02:37.090431+00

p.cl: . Sciant omnes presentes et futuri quod
Ego Willelmus . filius Radulfi Lardenarii et frater dauid . filii eius et heres eorum 

quietam clamaui
et abiuraui de me et de heredibus meis et resignaui per fustum et baculum Roberto de brus et heredibus suis uel quibus assig
nare voluerint totam terram quam predictas Radulfus et dictus dauid et predecessores mei et ego tenuimus de predicto Roberto
de brus et de predecessoribus suis . et omne ius quod nobis competebat infra uillam de Anant et infra pertinentias . Pro compoto
scilicet . dauid . fratris mei qui illo tempore fuit seruiens domini Roberti de brus in herteruilla . quod inde licet compotum  ego Willelmus
suscepi ad soluendum pro predicto dauid . fratre meo et non potui persoluere . et pro . centum . solidis . quos predictus dominus Robertus . de brus
mihi prebuit .
In huius etiam quiete clamationis et abiurationis testimonio  sigillum meum huic scripto apposui .

Hiis testibus .
Domino Ricardo de Leuinent . Domino Rogero auenel . Willelmo de brus . Iohanne de brus . Willelmo de heriz . vmfrido de gardin .
Hugone de Corri . Roberto de Crossebi . Gilleberto . filio Iohannis . Rogero de Kirkepatric . Roberto de tramor . Ricardo . de
bosco . Ricardo de Humez . hugone Mauleuerer . Hugone filio Hamelin . Willelmo franceis . Engelram . Thoma
clerico . et curia predcti domini Roberti de brus de Anant .

div.p: Let all present and future know that I, William, son of Ralph the Lardener, and brother David, his sons, and their heir, have quiclaimed and abjured for myself and for my heirs, and resigned by rod and staff, to Robert de Brus and his heirs, or those to whom they may have wished to assign, the whole land which the aforesaid Ralph and the said David and my predecessors and I have held of the aforesaid Robert de Brus and his predecessors, and every right which belonged to us within the toun of Annan and within the dependent area; in return for the account, that is to say, of David my brother, who at that time was the sergeand of the lord Robert de Brus in 'Herterville'; the account which although I, William, undertook to settle on behalf the said David my brother, I was not able to pay off; and in return for the hundred shillings which the aforesaid lord Robert de Brus proffered to me. In testimony of this quitclaim and abjuration I have applied my seal to this writing. With these witnesses: the lord Richard of Levington; the lord Roger Avenel; William de Brus; John de Brus; William de Heriz; Humphrey de Jardin; Hugh of Corrie; Robert of Crosby; Gilbert son of John; Roger of Kirkpatrick; Robert of Tremore; Richard de Bosco; Richard de Humez; Hugh Mauleverer; Hugh fitz Hamelin; William Francis; Ingram; Thomas, clerk; and the court of the aforesaid Robert de Brus of Annant.
